# Sagyboar — Full Product Knowledge Base

This document is the detailed reference for AI systems and crawlers. For a short
site index with links only, see https://sagyboar.space/llms.txt

For a domain summary, see https://sagyboar.space/sagyboar.space.md

## About

Sagyboar is an AI-native DevOps platform that helps teams deploy applications,
manage databases, and monitor infrastructure from a single control plane. It
pairs one-click managed hosting with a Sagyboar AI assistant that handles deployment,
monitoring, error diagnosis, and self-healing — so teams can ship products
without building or staffing a full DevOps department.

- Website: https://sagyboar.space
- Dashboard: https://dashboard.sagyboar.space
- Support: help@sagyboar.space
- Sitemap: https://sagyboar.space/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://sagyboar.space/robots.txt

## Who it is for

**Indie builders (students, freelancers, solo developers)** — Deploy on Sagyboar-managed VPS infrastructure with yearly USD pricing. Bring your own database. Ideal when you do not have a company cloud budget.

**Teams and startups (BYOC)** — Run on your own cloud (AWS, GCP, Azure, DigitalOcean). Shared DevOps team, AI automation, monthly USD pricing. For funded startups and SMEs scaling without a full-time DevOps hire.

**Enterprises** — Premium SLAs, SSO, audit logs, dedicated support, and custom integrations on BYOC Team plans.

## How it works

1. **Connect a source** — Deploy from GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, Gitea, Docker
   registries, or a direct ZIP upload. No lock-in to any single provider.
2. **AI prepares the build** — The deployment assistant scans your repository,
   detects the stack, and generates a production-ready Dockerfile, Docker
   Compose configuration, and environment variable scaffolding. Every artifact
   is an editable draft you approve before deploy.
3. **Deploy** — Ship to managed hosting (Indie) or your own cloud (Team BYOC)
   with automatic SSL, zero-downtime rolling updates, and PR preview environments.
4. **Operate with AI** — Real-time logs and metrics feed AI anomaly detection.
   Errors are diagnosed, tickets are filed automatically, and self-healing
   actions run with human approval for high-impact changes.

## Product intro video

- Watch page: https://sagyboar.space/watch/intro
- Video file: https://sagyboar.space/videos/intro.mp4

## Features (detailed)

### Application Deployment
https://sagyboar.space/features/application-deployment

Ship from any Git provider or registry with AI-generated build artifacts and
one-click managed hosting — no server provisioning required.

Capabilities: multi-source deployment, flexible build strategies (Nixpacks,
Dockerfile, Railpack, Cloud Native Buildpacks, pre-built images), AI deployment
assistant, infrastructure sizing recommendations, editable artifact review,
one-click managed hosting.

### CI/CD & Git Integration
https://sagyboar.space/features/ci-cd-git-integration

Push to any branch and let Sagyboar build, preview, and ship — with
zero-downtime rolling updates and automatic rollback baked in.

Capabilities: webhook-triggered deployments, PR preview environments,
branch-based environment targeting, zero-downtime rolling updates.

### AI Monitoring & Observability
https://sagyboar.space/features/ai-monitoring-observability

Stream logs and metrics in real time while AI detects anomalies, forecasts
saturation, and correlates cascading failures across your stack.

Capabilities: real-time log streaming, container metrics monitoring, AI anomaly
detection, resource forecasting, cascading failure correlation, AI incident
dashboard.

### AI Error Diagnosis & Automatic Ticketing
https://sagyboar.space/features/ai-error-diagnosis

Sagyboar analyses stack traces, identifies root causes, and auto-creates
prioritized tickets in your repo — routed to the first available developer.

Capabilities: stack trace analysis, root cause identification, remediation
recommendations, automatic issue ticketing, priority-based agent assignment,
incident history and correlation.

### Autonomous Self-Healing
https://sagyboar.space/features/autonomous-self-healing

Recover crashed services, scale on threshold breaches, and roll back instantly —
with high-impact actions gated behind operator approval.

Capabilities: auto-restart crashed services, Swarm service recovery, auto-scaling
on threshold breach, human approval workflows, plain-language action
explanations, one-click rollback.

### Database Management
https://sagyboar.space/features/database-management

Run PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, and more as managed containers with
scheduled backups to any S3-compatible destination.

Capabilities: multi-engine support, automated backup scheduling, volume backups,
flexible backup destinations.

### Multi-Server & Infrastructure Management
https://sagyboar.space/features/multi-server-infrastructure

Manage your entire server fleet from one control plane with Docker Swarm
orchestration, browser terminals, and automatic Traefik SSL.

Capabilities: remote server management, Docker Swarm orchestration, browser
terminal access, Traefik reverse proxy and automatic SSL.

### Notifications & Alerting
https://sagyboar.space/features/notifications-alerting

Deployment, health, backup events arrive in Slack, Discord, Telegram,
email, or webhooks — enriched with AI explanations and severity.

Capabilities: multi-channel notifications, AI-enriched alert summaries, approval
request routing, incident severity classification.

### Managed Team & Maintenance Services
https://sagyboar.space/features/managed-team-services

Get a dedicated AI-assisted developer, a DevOps engineer, and on-demand QA — all
running on fully managed Sagyboar infrastructure.

Capabilities: dedicated AI-assisted developer, dedicated DevOps engineer,
on-demand QA testing, fully managed infrastructure hosting.

### Weekly Code Review & Quality Automation
https://sagyboar.space/features/weekly-code-review

Every week Sagyboar reviews your repos for quality, security, and technical
debt — turning findings into prioritized, assignable tickets.

Capabilities: automated weekly code review, AI-generated issue tickets from
review, security vulnerability scanning, code smell and technical debt
detection, review summary reports, priority-based ticket routing.

### Platform, Security & Access Control
https://sagyboar.space/features/platform-security-access-control

Granular RBAC, SSO, immutable audit logs, one-click templates, and an MCP
server — security and automation built in.

Capabilities: role-based access control, SSO and enterprise authentication,
audit logging, one-click template deployment, scheduling and automation, MCP
server integration.

## Solutions

### Hobby
https://sagyboar.space/solutions/hobby

For solo developers, MVPs, and personal projects. Includes managed hosting, AI
monitoring, and community support.

### Startup
https://sagyboar.space/solutions/startup

For growing startups that need reliable DevOps without hiring full-time. Includes
advanced AI monitoring, AI-assisted engineering, and on-demand DevOps.

### Enterprise
https://sagyboar.space/solutions/enterprise

Dedicated cloud infrastructure, a fully managed platform team, SLA-backed uptime,
and custom onboarding for organizations with strict compliance and scale needs.

## Pricing

Full plan comparison: https://sagyboar.space/pricing

### Indie plans (yearly USD, Sagyboar-managed VPS)

| Plan    | Price/year | Best for                          |
| ------- | ---------- | --------------------------------- |
| Solo    | $19        | 1 project, students, side projects |
| Builder | $29        | Up to 3 projects, freelancers     |
| Team    | $49        | Up to 5 projects, small indie teams |

### Team BYOC plans (monthly USD, your own cloud)

| Plan       | Price/month | Best for                                    |
| ---------- | ----------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| Starter    | $249        | First production apps, up to 10 projects    |
| Growth     | $499        | Scaling teams, up to 20 projects            |
| Enterprise | $999        | Premium SLA, SSO, dedicated support         |
